sentences.arabic: كَانَ الأَسَدُ مَلِكَ الْغَابَةِ يَمْشِي ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ وَهُوَ جَائِعٌ.
sentences.translation: Lav, kralj šume, jednog je dana hodao gladan.
sentences.translationEn: The lion, king of the forest, was walking one day feeling hungry.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ أَرْنَبًا صَغِيرًا يَقِفُ أَمَامَهُ وَلَا يَخَافُ.
sentences.translation: Ispred sebe je ugledao malog zeca koji je stajao bez straha.
sentences.translationEn: He found a small rabbit standing before him without fear.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الأَرْنَبُ: «يَا مَلِكَ الْغَابَةِ، أَنَا صَغِيرٌ وَلَا أُشْبِعُكَ، لَكِنِّي أَعْرِفُ أَسَدًا آخَرَ فِي الْبِئْرِ.»
sentences.translation: Zec reče: 'O kralju šume, ja sam mali i nećeš se nasititi mnome, ali znam za drugog lava u bunaru.'
sentences.translationEn: The rabbit said: 'O king of the forest, I am small and won't satisfy your hunger, but I know of another lion in the well.'

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ الأَسَدُ إِلَى الْبِئْرِ فَرَأَى صُورَتَهُ فِي الْمَاءِ وَظَنَّهَا عَدُوًّا.
sentences.translation: Lav ode do bunara i u vodi ugleda svoj odraz, misleći da je neprijatelj.
sentences.translationEn: The lion went to the well and saw his reflection in the water, thinking it was an enemy.

sentences.arabic: قَفَزَ فِيهَا فَغَرِقَ، وَنَجَا الأَرْنَبُ الذَّكِيُّ بِعَقْلِهِ لَا بِقُوَّتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Skočio je u bunar i utopio se, a pametni zec se spasio razumom, a ne snagom.
sentences.translationEn: He leapt in and drowned, and the clever rabbit saved himself with his mind, not his strength.
